decisions.decision: Create a shared createMockQueryResult<T> helper in helpers.tsx and consolidate all 4 test files (Portfolio, MarketDetail, DiscussionThread, ConditionalEditor) to use it. Also create a shared createMockMutationResult helper for the 3 files with duplicate defaultMutationState().
alternatives_rejected: Fix only Portfolio.test.tsx (other files also fail build since tsconfig includes src/__tests__/)
Fix each file independently with inline mocks (leads to continued drift)

decisions.decision: Add a targeted type declaration for process.env in a test-globals.d.ts file under src/, not @types/node. Only chartUtils.test.ts uses process.env.
alternatives_rejected: Add @types/node to devDependencies (pulls in all Node.js types, may conflict with DOM types)
Add declaration to vite-env.d.ts (mixes Vite concerns with test concerns)

decisions.decision: Use non-null assertions (!) for array indexed access in ProbabilityBar.test.tsx and api-client.test.ts. This matches the established codebase convention (40+ existing uses across 13+ test files).
alternatives_rejected: Type guards (inconsistent with 40+ existing non-null assertion usages in test files, unnecessarily verbose)

decisions.decision: Run pnpm install first, then pnpm build to get the actual full error list before making changes. The research couldn't verify the complete error set without node_modules.
alternatives_rejected: Fix only the known errors and hope for the best (risky, a5 assumption had only 0.75 confidence)

steps.task: Run `pnpm install` in the frontend directory to get node_modules, then run `pnpm build` (or `tsc -b --noEmit`) to capture the complete list of TypeScript errors that need fixing.

Create shared createMockQueryResult<T> helper in frontend/src/__tests__/helpers.tsx. Base it on MarketDetail.test.tsx's most complete mock (25 props) and add any missing properties identified from the actual UseQueryResult type in node_modules/@tanstack/react-query. Also create a shared createMockMutationResult helper.

Refactor Portfolio.test.tsx, MarketDetail.test.tsx, DiscussionThread.test.tsx, and ConditionalEditor.test.tsx to import and use the shared createMockQueryResult and createMockMutationResult helpers from helpers.tsx, removing their local duplicates.
Create frontend/src/test-globals.d.ts with a minimal `declare var process: { env: Record<string, string | undefined> }` declaration to fix the chartUtils.test.ts process.env.TZ type error.
Add non-null assertions (!) to array indexed access in ProbabilityBar.test.tsx and api-client.test.ts where noUncheckedIndexedAccess causes 'possibly undefined' errors.
Run `pnpm build` again to verify all TypeScript errors are resolved. If new errors surfaced, fix them iteratively until the build passes clean.
Run `pnpm test` to verify all tests still pass after the refactoring.
